generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor for environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light sensor for visual comfort monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor for space usage monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light level measurements for visual comfort analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data for space utilization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance BuildingInformationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models containing geometric, spatial, and functional characteristics of building components, used as the semantic backbone for generating runtime artifacts and enabling data-driven operations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTools
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators and controllers within Building Control Systems (BCS) for lighting systems"
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT device connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, ReinforcementLearningOptimizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insights for building operations monitoring"
]

instance SimulationPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for simulation-based performance analysis"
]

instance PredictiveEnergyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for predicting energy consumption trends"
]

instance PredictiveComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for predicting comfort levels based on trends"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation for performance analysis of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationPerformanceInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy and comfort trends"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveEnergyInsight, PredictiveComfortInsight
]

instance ReinforcementLearningOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based optimization of energy consumption, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortImprovementInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectManagementInsight, AdjustLightingAction
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for optimizing energy consumption based on real-time sensor data and simulation results"
]

instance VisualComfortImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for improving visual comfort through dynamic lighting adjustments"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for managing non-visual health effects like circadian rhythm disruption via environmental control"
]

instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting systems based on occupancy and light levels"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure in AECO domain for real-time monitoring and optimization"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, LightSensor, OccupancySensor, LightingActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the digital twin for Building Control Systems (BCS), such as lighting adjustments or HVAC commands, transmitted back to physical actuators through the same communication channels."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data updates from sensors, enabling immediate response to physical changes in the building environment."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A framework where BIM serves as the semantic backbone, integrated with Eclipse Hono and Ditto for bidirectional data exchange, Unreal Engine for interactive visualization, and standardized extension points for modular service integration to support building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all life cycle stages from initial design through construction, operation, and refurbishment, with BIM serving as a semantic backbone for continuous data integration."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity assessed using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure the alignment between the digital twin and its physical counterpart."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for IoT connectivity and digital twin management."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems such as AI analytics platforms and sensor networks, facilitated through standardized extension points for service-oriented architecture."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards for semantic representation, with standardized extension points for interoperable service integration."
]
